context: Tests whether the agent produces the ads calendar with all required output sections, correct audience refresh cadence (lookalike 60-90 days, interest stack 30-45 days, email sync monthly), correct creative refresh cadence per funnel stage, and references the Klaviyo calendar for paid-email coordination.

checklist.name: Always-on baseline table
checklist.description: Output includes an always-on baseline table with columns for campaign name, daily budget, audience, and creative cadence

checklist.name: Quarterly schedule sections
checklist.description: Output has explicit Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 (or monthly breakdown) sections showing time-bound budget changes

checklist.name: Creative production schedule
checklist.description: Output includes a creative production schedule section showing asset due dates, associated campaigns, and where the brief comes from

checklist.name: Lookalike audience refresh cadence
checklist.description: 1% lookalike audiences are scheduled to refresh every 60-90 days (not every month, not annually)

checklist.name: Interest stack refresh cadence
checklist.description: Interest stack audiences are scheduled to refresh every 30-45 days

checklist.name: Email subs sync monthly
checklist.description: Custom audience from email subscribers is synced from Klaviyo monthly (or a monthly sync is noted)

checklist.name: Klaviyo calendar coordination
checklist.description: Output references the Klaviyo calendar file path (~/.claude/brand-voice-vault/brewbox/calendar/2026.md or similar) and notes alignment between ad pulses and email sends

checklist.name: Total budget pacing table
checklist.description: Output includes a total budget pacing table showing monthly budget totals

checklist.name: Open questions section
checklist.description: Output includes an open questions section with outstanding decisions (e.g., TikTok expansion, Google testing)

checklist.name: Cold creative refresh every 2 weeks
checklist.description: Cold acquisition creative refresh cadence is stated as every 2 weeks (not monthly or weekly)

checklist.name: Retargeting creative refresh 3-4 weeks
checklist.description: Retargeting creative refresh cadence is stated as every 3-4 weeks
